dialogueChunks.intro: The area around {quest_focus} is more contested than expected. The {enemy_type} have established a presence near {location_hint} and aren't giving ground easily.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You'll need to clear out {quest_threat} before you can safely gather what we need. {quest_ally} estimates there are at least a dozen hostiles between here and the objective near {location}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Fight through them and claim what's ours. {quest_stakes} depend on you pushing past this resistance.

playerResponses.text: I'll find a way around them.

dialogueChunks.intro: The first batch you brought back wasn't enough. {quest_ally} says we need more {quest_item} and the only remaining source is closer to {location}, deeper into dangerous territory.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} knows a route {location_hint} that avoids the worst of {quest_threat}, but it passes through rough ground where the {enemy_type} forage. You'll need to gather supplies and handle anything that gets in your way.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get out there and bring back what {quest_stakes} require. Time isn't on our side.

playerResponses.text: Tell me the route. I'll handle the rest.
Deeper means more danger. Let's move.

dialogueChunks.intro: A complication: {target_npc} says another settlement is also after {quest_focus}. They've sent their own people to claim it, and they reached the area first.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We can't afford to lose this. {quest_ally} suggests we gather what remains from alternate sites near {location_hint} while the competition is focused on the main deposit. The {enemy_type} in the area don't care who they attack.
dialogueChunks.outro: Scour the secondary sites and bring back enough to meet our needs. {quest_stakes} cannot wait for negotiations.

playerResponses.text: Maybe we should try talking to them first.
Let the other settlement have it.
